info.name: JobNow API - 3 Tasks
info.description:
Minimalist API for JobNow

- JNV-2: Entreprise Registration
- JNV-15: Post Job Offer
- JNV-22: Apply for Job

request.description:
Register a new entreprise account.

**Required fields:**
- email (unique)
- password (min 8 chars)
- password_confirmation
- raison_social

**Optional fields:**
- adresse
- telephone

body.raw:
{
    "titre": "Développeur Laravel Senior",
    "description": "Nous recherchons un développeur Laravel expérimenté pour rejoindre notre équipe.",
    "type_contrat": "CDI",
    "competences_requises": ["Laravel", "PHP", "MySQL", "REST API"],
    "localisation": "Casablanca, Maroc",
    "salaire": "15000-20000 MAD",
    "date_expiration": "2026-05-30"
}

request.description:
Create a new job offer (Entreprise only).

**Required fields:**
- titre
- description
- type_contrat (CDI, CDD, Stage, Freelance)

**Optional fields:**
- competences_requises (array)
- localisation
- salaire
- date_expiration (must be future date)

formdata.value: Je suis très motivé pour rejoindre votre équipe...

request.description:
Apply for a job offer (Candidat only).

**Required fields:**
- offre_id (must exist)
- cv (file: PDF, DOC, DOCX - max 5MB)

**Optional fields:**
- lettre_motivation (max 5000 chars)

**Note:** You need to be authenticated as a candidat to use this endpoint.
